title: Makos on Main at the Wharf
notes:
Line up at 6:00 and parade begins at 6:30

 *  
 All students planning to walk in the parade should arrive at The Wharf no later than 6:00 PM to line up. 
 
*  
 Students in kindergarten through the second grade will walk in the parade with their teachers and parents as necessary, then stop along the end of the route to watch the remainder of the parade.   
 
*  
 Students will walk together by grade. Sport uniforms are certainly allowed, but students should walk with their class.
